name: Vegetarian Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Hot pepper sauce or to taste
1 can 16 oz Black eyed peas (drained and chopped)
1/4 cup Parsley or chives for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatoes, broth, rice, garlic, bay leaves, basil, thyme, and hot pepper sauce in a large saucepan.
2. Cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. When the rice is cooking, cut the green bell pepper into 1-inch pieces and stir them into the stew.
4. Reduce heat to medium, then stir in the black-eyed peas. Cover and simmer for 10 to 12 minutes, stirring once.
5. Remove and discard the bay leaves. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
This is a Louisiana-inspired stew that is rich and fairly thick. For a thinner stew, add additional broth. Serving suggestion: Serve with garlic bread.
